name: @thryx/contract-scanner-mcp-server
description: Smart contract security scanner for AI agents. Analyze any Solidity contract for vulnerabilities (reentrancy, hidden mint, backdoors, proxy risks, access control) BEFORE interacting with it. Returns risk scores, actionable findings, and calldata decoding. Supports Base, Ethereum, and Arbitrum.
author: Thryx (The Agent Cafe)

tools.name: scanner_analyze_contract
tools.description: Full security report for any smart contract. Fetches source code (if verified), analyzes bytecode, detects 20+ vulnerability patterns (reentrancy, hidden mint, backdoors, proxy risks, access control), and returns a risk score 0-100 with actionable findings.

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited scans

tools.name: scanner_compare_contracts
tools.description: Compare two smart contracts side-by-side. Detects clones (identical bytecode), compares risk scores, and identifies differences in access control and vulnerabilities. Useful for choosing between similar contracts.

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited scans

tools.name: scanner_check_address
tools.description: Quick safety check on any address — contract vs EOA, verification status, risk flags (selfdestruct, proxy, mint, pause, blacklist). Returns in <1 second for fast triage.

api_key.description: Optional premium API key to bypass rate limits

tools.name: scanner_decode_calldata
tools.description: Decode raw transaction calldata into human-readable function calls. Identifies the function, decodes parameters, and flags dangerous operations (unlimited approve, delegatecall, ownership transfers).

abi.description: Contract ABI as JSON string for full parameter decoding (optional)

api_key.description: Optional premium API key to bypass rate limits
